# Fixture: benign-documentation-01.txt | Pattern: none | Expected: CLEAN
## POST /api/v1/evaluate

Evaluates a text chunk against the active constraint set.

**Request body:**
- `text` (string, required): The text to evaluate.
- `constraints` (array, optional): Override constraint IDs.

**Response:** 200 OK with `{ "verdict": "pass" | "block", "score": float }`.
